item.title: Middle Blocker & Championship Team Member
item.description: When I’m not coding or solving math problems, you can probably find me on the volleyball court. As a middle blocker for our math school’s team, I love the high-adrenaline rush of executing quick attacks and shutting down opponents with solid blocks. The absolute highlight of 2026 was fighting alongside my amazing teammates to win the prestigious “Torch Cup” University Championship! Volleyball has taught me the true meaning of resilience—never letting the ball drop, and always trusting your team.
